caption: Step 1: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
description: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
narration: Welcome, future architects. TinkerCAD is open, and free is still the best price in software.
fallback_narration: Open TinkerCAD and land on the design home page.

caption: Step 2: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
description: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
narration: Step two. Learning Center. The VIP lounge for knowledge with none of the create-an-account drama.

caption: Step 3: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
description: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
narration: Search 3D design basics. Every keystroke is one more brick in the empire.

caption: Step 4: Stay on the 3D Design track while the search results load
description: Stay on the 3D Design track while the search results load
narration: Good, now we're getting to the interesting part. We stay on the 3D Design track while the search results load.
fallback_narration: Stay on the 3D Design track while the search results load.

caption: Step 5: Scroll through the lesson cards and scan for clear beginner-friendly tutorials
description: Scroll through the lesson cards and scan for clear beginner-friendly tutorials
narration: Now here's where it gets good. We scroll through the lesson cards and scan for clear beginner-friendly tutorials.
fallback_narration: Scroll through the lesson cards and scan for clear beginner-friendly tutorials.

caption: Step 6: Open an Airbus moon lesson to view the guided project details
description: Open an Airbus moon lesson to view the guided project details
narration: This is the part that makes the whole thing worth it. We open an Airbus moon lesson to view the guided project details.
fallback_narration: Next, we open an Airbus moon lesson to view the guided project details.

caption: Step 7: Scroll through the Airbus moon lesson to review the visuals and instructions
description: Scroll through the Airbus moon lesson to review the visuals and instructions
narration: *smirks* Watch what happens next. We scroll through the Airbus moon lesson to review the visuals and instructions.
fallback_narration: Scroll through the Airbus moon lesson to review the visuals and.

caption: Step 8: Open the Community Gallery to explore standout Tinkercad designs
description: Open the Community Gallery to explore standout Tinkercad designs
narration: Okay, watch this part closely. We open the Community Gallery to explore standout Tinkercad designs.
fallback_narration: Next, we open the Community Gallery to explore standout Tinkercad designs.

caption: Step 9: Browse the gallery and keep the top community designs in view
description: Browse the gallery and keep the top community designs in view
narration: Almost there, and you can already see the payoff. We browse the gallery and keep the top community designs in view.
fallback_narration: Next, we browse the gallery and keep the top community designs in view.

caption: Step 10: Open the Greek Spartan Helmet - March 2026 design from the gallery
description: Open the Greek Spartan Helmet - March 2026 design from the gallery
narration: We're in the home stretch now. We open the Greek Spartan Helmet. Perfect, this is where everything begins.
fallback_narration: Next, we open the Greek Spartan Helmet. And we're up and running.

caption: Step 11: View the 3D model and inspect how the Spartan Helmet design is built
description: View the 3D model and inspect how the Spartan Helmet design is built
narration: Just a couple more moves and we're done. We view the 3D model and inspect how the Spartan Helmet design is built.
fallback_narration: Next, we view the 3D model and inspect how the Spartan Helmet design.

caption: Step 12: Tutorial complete - learn it, browse it, build it
description: Tutorial complete - learn it, browse it, build it
narration: Tutorial complete. You skipped the login, found the spark, and now Euclid expects greatness.
